ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Dogmatum Communiter Receptorum Examen In decem Excertitationes Paradoxicas Distinctum, A Sebastiano Bartolo Illustrissimi, & Excellentissimi Domini D. Petri Antonii Aragonii In Neapolitano Regno Proregis Medico In Suorum Studiorum Tyrocinio Elucubratum
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The text contains various references to Investiganti academicians.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: D`Aragona,Pietro Antonio,Duke of Segorbe and Cardona|viceroy of Naples,1611 - 1690

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
